title: selaginella integrifolia
intro: Selaginella integrifolia, also known as Spiked Spike Moss, is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae, native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Selaginella integrifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
